_notes: This file is embedded in the axon CLI at build time and used as
the single source of truth for servo-model metadata, parameter
defaults, and bundled firmware file references.
Model IDs (the `id` field) are the ASCII bytes at config offset
0x40..0x47 with trailing '*' as padding. Only the Axon Mini has
been confirmed empirically so far (SA33****); Max and Micro are
placeholders pending a physical read from those models.
Parameter byte offsets and encodings come from docs/BYTE_MAPPING.md
which cites specific lines in the Ghidra decomp under
Default values for the SA33**** Mini are the raw bytes observed in
factory-default Mini). Any `deg` / `percent` values are the best
available human-unit interpretation; fields marked `_approx: true`
still need confirmation via .svo A/B diff (tracked in issue #11).
Fields marked `_unknown: true` could not be determined from the

range._comment: BE u16 at 0x0A..0x0B = 0x0050 mirrored at 0x27..0x2C; raw 80 believed to encode full Mini range (~355 deg), deg formula unconfirmed.

center._comment: byte 0x06 = 0x80; encoding stored = user + 0x80, so raw 128 = 0 deg offset (centered).

damping._comment: byte 0x0C = 0x50; encoding stored = (user + 1) * 16, so raw 80 → user 4 (out of 0..14).

speed_limit._comment: byte 0x11 = 0xDC mirrored at 0x12, 0x13, and 0x0F (= primary - 0x14); unit unknown.

_Axon_Max_placeholder._TODO: Fill in once we can read a Max servo. Model ID unknown.
_Axon_Max_placeholder.name: Axon Max

_Axon_Micro_placeholder._TODO: Fill in once we can read a Micro servo. Model ID and firmware unknown.
_Axon_Micro_placeholder.name: Axon Micro

range.description: Total angular sweep of the servo. Stored as a big-endian u16 at config offset 0x0A..0x0B, and mirrored (same widget, same value) at 0x27..0x28, 0x29..0x2A, and 0x2B..0x2C — each mirror is an internal rate-limit register initialized from the user's range setting.
range.deg_formula: approx: deg = raw * (model.max_range_deg / 80); unverified, needs A/B .svo diff

center.description: Home / neutral offset. In the vendor UI this is the 'Neutral' trackbar (VCL event-handler symbol `rztrNeutralChange` at 0x007a9888). Stored as a single byte at config offset 0x06 with encoding `stored = user + 0x80`, so raw 0x80 is the factory-neutral 0-degree offset.
center.deg_formula: deg = (raw - 128) * model.deg_per_count; deg_per_count unverified, needs A/B .svo diff

direction.description: Rotation direction. Stored as bit 0x02 of the flags byte at config offset 0x25. A secondary 'dirty' bit at 0x01 is toggled each time the user changes the checkbox, but only bit 0x02 is the persistent setting.
direction.confidence_note: Byte/bit location derived from the checkbox-toggle→persistent-bit pattern in FUN_00405518 lines 88-108. No literal 'Direction' label string was found in data_printable_runs.txt; a .svo A/B diff of the vendor UI's 'Reverse' checkbox would promote this to high confidence.

damping.description: Control-loop damping factor. In the vendor UI this is the 'Damping Factor: ' trackbar (ASCII format string at 0x007a734a, VCL event-handler symbol `rztrDampingChange` at 0x007a98b4). Stored as a single byte at config offset 0x0C with encoding `stored = (user + 1) * 16`, giving 15 discrete user-visible steps (user = 0..14).

speed_limit.description: Maximum slew rate / speed limit. Stored as a single byte at config offset 0x11 and mirrored to 0x12, 0x13, and 0x0F (where 0x0F = primary - 0x14). The widget behind it (`p1+0x370`) writes all four in one pass. Physical unit is unknown — likely percent (0..100) or raw PWM counts.
speed_limit.confidence_note: Byte locations are certain (directly from FUN_00405518 lines 203-210). The 'speed_limit' label is inferential: the one-widget-many-rate-limit-registers pattern is canonical for max-speed / max-current settings, but we haven't seen a label string to confirm it. _unknown_unit: true — expose in raw for v1.0 until confirmed.
